summary: Tested Master SKU and Raw Material creation forms with mandatory fields (hsn_code, gst_rate, cost_price), Purchase Register workflow, and Finance & GST Dashboard. Fixed backend issue where gst_rate and cost_price were not being saved for raw materials.

minor.issue: Response doesn't include invoice_number field, only purchase_number - minor test assertion issue

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Backend create_raw_material endpoint was not saving gst_rate and cost_price fields - now fixed
Fixed: Backend create_master_sku endpoint was not saving product_type, manufacturing_role, production_charge_per_unit fields - now fixed
seed_data_creation: Created test Master SKUs and Raw Materials during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Master SKU and Raw Material forms now have all mandatory fields (hsn_code, gst_rate, cost_price). Purchase Register and Finance Dashboard are working correctly. Backend was fixed to save gst_rate and cost_price for raw materials.

master_sku_form.details: All mandatory fields (HSN Code, GST Rate, Cost Price) are present and functional

raw_material_form.details: All mandatory fields (HSN Code, GST Rate, Cost Price) are present and functional

form_validation.details: Backend correctly rejects requests missing mandatory fields with 422 validation error

purchase_register.details: Purchase creation, listing, and stock updates working correctly

finance_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with inventory valuation, GST planning tabs working
